stops.name: Galeries Lafayette Paris Haussmann
stops.notes: A prime luxury shopping destination with stunning architecture (art), high fashion, and gourmet food options, perfect for a romantic couple. | Tags: Shopping | ⭐ 4.2/5 (8,058 reviews)

stops.name: The Seine
stops.notes: Quintessential Parisian romance, especially with a luxury dinner cruise. Offers beautiful views of the city's architecture (art) and aligns with the romantic and cuisine preferences. | Tags: Nature & Parks, Attractions | ⭐ 4.6/5 (25,838 reviews)

stops.name: Le Marais
stops.notes: A vibrant historic district offering a mix of art galleries, high-end boutiques, charming cafes and restaurants, perfect for romantic strolls and cultural immersion for a luxury traveler. | Tags: Sights & Landmarks, Attractions, Other | ⭐ 4.6/5 (13,024 reviews)

stops.name: ExperienceFirst Paris
stops.notes: A highly-rated tour operator likely offering diverse, potentially customizable experiences aligning with art, fashion, cuisine, and romance, suitable for a luxury traveler. | Tags: Tours, Activities | ⭐ 4.8/5 (20,987 reviews)

stops.name: Cathedrale Notre-Dame de Paris
stops.address: 6 Parvis Notre-Dame Place Jean-Paul II, 75004 Paris France
stops.notes: Iconic landmark aligning with art, history, and romance. A quintessential Parisian experience, even with ongoing reconstruction. | Tags: Sights & Landmarks, Attractions | ⭐ 4.6/5 (72,329 reviews)

stops.name: Big Bus Paris
stops.notes: A convenient way to see many sights, but doesn't align strongly with the luxury or deep romance/art preferences of the traveler, who might prefer more curated experiences. | Tags: Tours, Activities | ⭐ 3.8/5 (7,909 reviews)
